current_dependency_risks: Current deterministic appointmentDayId bridge depends on known container ranges that expire around 2027-04-30.
Public sellable dynamic offers currently filter to zero under confirmed-container policy.
Lander does not yet own registration/payment/roster/attendance/card workflows.
Waiting until April 2027 leaves no operational buffer if native replacement or renewed container ranges fail.

phases.name: Shadow dynamic scheduling
phases.goal: Run the dynamic scheduler beside fixed Enrollware classes with no customer-facing behavior change.
go_no_go_criteria: Reports explain all major rejection reasons
phases.rollback_plan: Stop running preview pipeline and continue fixed Enrollware schedule only.

phases.name: Internal live preview
phases.goal: Let Brian/admin review proposed dynamic seeds before they are public.
go_no_go_criteria: Rejected seeds are traceable to policy reasons
phases.rollback_plan: Hide/ignore internal preview output; keep fixed public schedule.

phases.name: Limited public pilot
phases.goal: Publish a very small set of dynamic options for one proven path only.
go_no_go_criteria: At least one reviewed seed generates correct preview URL
No missing container coverage for pilot path
phases.rollback_plan: Disable dynamic flag and show fixed schedule/contact fallback.

phases.name: Container-backed Enrollware bridge
phases.goal: Use Enrollware as enrollment/roster endpoint while Lander owns offer selection.
go_no_go_criteria: Worker rebuilds URL from trusted config
phases.rollback_plan: Return buttons to fixed Enrollware class links only.

phases.name: Native Lander registration/payment
phases.goal: Move registration intent, customer intake, and payment into Lander-controlled flow.
go_no_go_criteria: Payment and registration state are reliable
phases.rollback_plan: Stop native checkout and route registrations back to Enrollware.

phases.name: Native roster/attendance/card workflow support
phases.goal: Support the operational workflows Enrollware currently covers after payment.
go_no_go_criteria: Admin can run a class from Lander data
phases.rollback_plan: Keep Enrollware as roster/source of record until workflow parity exists.

phases.name: Enrollware fallback reduction
phases.goal: Reduce Enrollware from scheduling brain to backup/exception path.
go_no_go_criteria: Most normal classes can be sold and managed without Enrollware
No critical workflow depends on appointmentDayId bridge
phases.rollback_plan: Renew/refresh appointmentDayId ranges and keep Enrollware as active bridge.

phases.name: Enrollware exit or backup-only mode
phases.goal: Choose whether to retire Enrollware from core operations or retain it as a backup.
go_no_go_criteria: Lander owns scheduling, registration, payment, roster, attendance, and reporting needed for operations
Backup mode is explicitly documented if retained
phases.rollback_plan: Keep/renew Enrollware as backup-only or active bridge if any critical native workflow is not ready.

march_2027_cutoff_checklist: Native schedule generation produces reviewed public options.
Click-time recheck is live or an equivalent server-side safety gate exists.
Registration intake is native or bridge-safe.
Payment handling is native or intentionally delegated.
Roster/attendance/completion/card workflow is native or formally retained in Enrollware.
Fallback plan for renewed appointmentDayId ranges is ready by January 2027.
Owner go/no-go decision made no later than March 1, 2027.
next_safest_build_step: Implement an internal preview/admin surface for dynamic seeds and close confirmed container coverage so at least one Brian + Shipyard seed can preview a URL, before any public wiring.
